title: Chiewab Laboratories
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Chiewab Laboratories''' was an aggressively acquisitive biotechnical company that was located within the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] as of [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. The corporation typically dealt with [[Cloning/Legends|cloning]], through many of its associated businesses such as [[ConCare]] and [[SanTech]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Bloodlines]]'' {{1stm}}
